Q3 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

A pinion of width 12 module with 24 full depth teeth of 20° pressure angle transmits 30 kW at 1200 rpm. The form factor for 20° full depth involute teeth is given as:

 
 
Using Lewis equation, the face width of the pinion is ______ (Rounded off to nearest integer)
[Take safe bending stress 200 MPa]
NAT
Correct answer: 36
Solution

36 (34 - 38)

 
 
Q4 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A sleeve bearing of inside diameter 40.05 mm supports a journal of diameter 40 mm rotating at 1440 rpm. The bearing carries a load of 3 kN bearing length is 20 mm and oil used has a viscosity of 25 centipoise at the average operating temperature. If the bearing carries a load of 3 kN, then the sommerfeld number for the bearing is ______. (Correct upto three decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.102
Solution

0.102 (0.090 - 0.120)

 
 
Q5 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statements is/are correct regarding Brakes?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c)
• Mechanical brakes, which are operated by mechanical means such as levers, springs and
pedals. Depending upon the shape of the friction material, the mechanical brakes are classified
as block brakes, internal or external shoes brakes, disk brakes and band brakes. Brakes are
also classified into two groups according to the direction of the actuating force, namely,
radial brakes and axial brakes. Internal and external shoe brakes are radial brakes, while
disk brakes are axial brakes.
• Hydraulic and pneumatic brakes, which are operated by fluid pressure such as oil pressure
or air pressure.
• Electrical brakes, which are operated by magnetic forces and which include magnetic particle
brakes, hysteresis brakes and eddy current brakes.

The required total number of steel and bronze plates, using uniform wear theory will be ________. (Round off to nearest integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 5
Solution

5 (5 - 5)

If the bearing used has the dynamic load capacity of 28100 N, then the expected life of bearing is ______ hours. [Rounded off to nearest integer]

NAT
Correct answer: 1753
Solution

1753 (1750 - 1760)

Correct answer: 34.4
Solution

Q29 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

In a boiler longitudinal joint is used to increase the diameter of boiler shell. The type of joint commonly used is

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
The plate of the boiler shell is bent to form the ring and two edges of the plate are joined by a
longitudinal butt joint. This longitudinal butt joint is usually double-strap triple riveted butt joint.
